name: Solaire 1150 Ripley
bathroomsNote: Units range 1-2 bathrooms; 2BR units have 2 baths

notes.concierge: 24/7 concierge confirmed by multiple resident reviews and listing sites; leasing office hours are Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm, Sun 12pm-5pm
notes.pool: Confirmed by resident reviews on ApartmentRatings and by the developer (Washington Property Company) site; not listed on official amenities page but multiple reviewers mention it specifically
notes.packageRoom: LuxerOne 24/7 package locker service listed on official amenities page
notes.inUnitLaundry: Full-size, extra-large capacity washer and dryer in all units per official amenities page
notes.balcony: Private balconies on select units only
notes.unitClimate: Air conditioning listed as a unit feature on ApartmentList; in-unit control assumed but not explicitly confirmed on official site
notes.building: 17-story, 295-unit LEED Gold certified transit-oriented development completed May 2012; direct Metro access (Silver Spring station 700 ft away)
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: Studios, 1BR, and 2BR confirmed; 1BR+den floor plan code A1D seen on ApartmentList suggesting den configuration
notes.wellMaintained: Consistent resident reviews praise maintenance responsiveness and cleanliness of amenities
notes.rentRange2BR: ApartmentList shows B3 from $2,530, B4 from $2,605, B5 from $2,720 (June 2026); ApartmentList overall range tops at ~$2,800
